inputs.label: Binary Base Exponent (2^n)
inputs.businessContext: Exponent for binary base; standard MiB uses 20

businessContext_i18n.en: Exponent for binary base; standard MiB uses 20
businessContext_i18n.tr: İkili taban üssü; standart MiB için 20 kullanılır

businessContext_i18n.es: Exponente para base binaria; MiB estándar usa 20
businessContext_i18n.ar: أس الأساس الثنائي؛ MiB القياسي يستخدم 20
